Hero.label: Built for all ages and skill levels.
Hero.description: Practical tutoring in coding, design, and cybersecurity.

Road.description: Master coding, design, or cybersecurity. Follow a clear, practical path with step-by-step tutoring.
Road.whatsapp_message: Hello DHAD Hackers! I am looking to enroll in one of your ready-made learning tracks. Could you please share more information regarding the available schedules and next steps?

Custom.description: Your goals aren’t pre-built, your learning shouldn't be either. Select core blocks from our curriculum matrix to compile an educational roadmap tailored entirely to you.

Modality.description: We offer multiple learning formats and flexible hours designed to match your routine. Pick the setting and the time that helps you focus, learn, and succeed.
Modality.online_desc: Join interactive virtual classrooms live from absolute anywhere.
Modality.home_desc: Get private, one-on-one remote coaching right from your space.
Modality.onsite_desc: Learn inside a professional tech environment directly in Oujda.
